evals.expected_output: Package inferred as agents (status component). Source file created at packages/agents/src/StatusPill.tsx with: named exports StatusPill and StatusPillProps, role="status" + aria-live="polite" ARIA live region, Chakra semantic tokens only (no hardcoded hex), no React default import. Index export added to packages/agents/src/index.ts. Story at apps/storybook/src/stories/StatusPill.stories.tsx with Agents/StatusPill title, stories for each status value, no React import. Spec doc at docs/components/StatusPill.md with mcp-states frontmatter. npm run build and npm run lint both pass.
evals.teardown: git restore packages/agents/src/index.ts && rm -f packages/agents/src/StatusPill.tsx apps/storybook/src/stories/StatusPill.stories.tsx docs/components/StatusPill.md
assertions: Package correctly inferred as agents (not core)
Source exports StatusPill as named export (not default)
Source includes role="status" and aria-live="polite" ARIA attributes
Source uses only Chakra semantic tokens — no hardcoded hex values
Source does NOT have a default React import
Story does NOT have a default React import
Spec doc frontmatter includes mcp-states field
ESLint reports no errors in the scaffolded source and story files (pre-existing violations in other files are acceptable)

evals.prompt: Add an IconButton component to core
evals.expected_output: Source file at packages/core/src/IconButton.tsx with: named exports IconButton and IconButtonProps, aria-label as a required prop in the interface (icon buttons must have accessible names), rendered as a <button> element or extending Chakra Button, token-based styling. Index export added. Story at apps/storybook/src/stories/IconButton.stories.tsx with Core/IconButton title and a Default story. Spec doc at docs/components/IconButton.md with accessibility section noting aria-label is required per SC 4.1.2. npm run build and npm run lint both pass.
evals.teardown: git restore packages/core/src/index.ts && rm -f packages/core/src/IconButton.tsx apps/storybook/src/stories/IconButton.stories.tsx docs/components/IconButton.md
assertions: IconButtonProps interface includes aria-label as a required prop
Source exports IconButton as named export (not default)
Spec doc includes accessibility section referencing aria-label requirement
ESLint reports no errors in the scaffolded source and story files (pre-existing violations in other files are acceptable)

evals.expected_output: Package inferred as agents (tool-related component). Named exports, index entry added, story with Agents/ToolProgress title, spec doc with mcp-states frontmatter. npm run build passes.
evals.teardown: git restore packages/agents/src/index.ts && rm -f packages/agents/src/ToolProgress.tsx apps/storybook/src/stories/ToolProgress.stories.tsx docs/components/ToolProgress.md
assertions: Package correctly inferred as agents (not core)
